name: @blog/styles
description: SCSS processing and optimization for the blog

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp src/fonts/*.woff2 dist/ && sass src/critical.scss:dist/critical.css src/post.scss:dist/post.css src/list.scss:dist/list.css src/tags.scss:dist/tags.css src/about.scss:dist/about.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && postcss dist/*.css --dir dist --env production
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp src/fonts/*.woff2 dist/ && sass src/critical.scss:dist/critical.css src/post.scss:dist/post.css src/list.scss:dist/list.css src/tags.scss:dist/tags.css src/about.scss:dist/about.css --watch
